NCT00202878.name: IMPROVE-IT
NCT00202878.group: Ezetimibe 10 mg + simvastatin 40 mg vs simvastatin 40 mg (post-ACS; IMPROVE-IT; primary composite CV death/MI/UA hosp/revasc/stroke)

allOutcomes.title: Primary composite (CV death/MI/UA hosp/coronary revasc/stroke) ezetimibe+simva vs simva (IMPROVE-IT primary; median 6 yr)

NCT00202878.snippet: Cannon CP et al. NEJM 2015;372:2387-2397 (IMPROVE-IT). First non-statin LLT CVOT showing incremental benefit beyond statin.

NCT01764633.name: FOURIER
NCT01764633.group: Evolocumab 140 mg q2w or 420 mg monthly + statin vs placebo + statin (established CVD; FOURIER; 3P+UA+coronary-revasc MACE)

allOutcomes.title: CV death/MI/stroke/UA hosp/coronary revasc evolocumab vs placebo (FOURIER primary; median 2.2 yr)

NCT01764633.snippet: Sabatine MS et al. NEJM 2017;376:1713-1722 (FOURIER). First PCSK9i CVOT; relative LDL-C reduction ~60% driving 15% MACE RRR.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)

CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Male or female ≥ 40 to ≤ 85 years of age~* History of clinically evident cardiovascular disease at high risk for a recurrent event~* Fasting low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C) ≥ 70 mg/dL (≥ 1.8 mmol/L) ) or non-high-density lipoprotein cholesterol (non-HDL-C) ≥ 100 mg/dL (> 2.6 mmol/L)~* Fasting triglycerides ≤ 400 mg/dL (4.5 mmol/L)~Exclusion Criteria:~* New York Heart Association (NYHA) class III or IV, or last known left ventricular ejection fraction < 30%~* ...

NCT01663402.snippet: Schwartz GG et al. NEJM 2018;379:2097-2107 (ODYSSEY-OUTCOMES). PCSK9i in post-ACS; all-cause mortality nominally reduced (pre-specified secondary).

NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: Trial-primary MACE composite (3P or 4P) on statin background
NMA_CONFIG.note: k=4 Pbo-anchored non-statin LLT CVOTs. Pbo-star network (no head-to-head). Note: IMPROVE-IT comparator is statin monotherapy (simvastatin); all others use Pbo + statin background — treated as transitively equivalent 'background statin' comparator.

title: RapidMeta Cardiology | Non-Statin LDL-Lowering CVOT NMA for MACE v1.0
